title: Installer Docker launch mode
acceptanceCriteria: Installer UX exposes an explicit Docker Compose launch option.
Non-interactive installs can request Docker launch through a documented flag.
Docker is not required for local install or existing-service reuse.
Compose startup never includes the host daemon.
Final output separates Compose control-plane startup from host-daemon pairing/startup.
Port conflict handling and Mini App port semantics are preserved.
Verification passes and a fresh verifier pass confirms the task.
Docs explain pnpm dev, Docker Compose, and manual startup choices.
